funds.name: Index Ventures
funds.description: Index Ventures is a venture capital firm that invests in start-ups with the potential to become global businesses. It was founded in 1996 and has locations all over the world.

funds.name: Seedcamp
funds.description: Seedcamp is a European investment firm and seed fund founded by Reshma Sohoni and Saul Klein in 2007.

funds.name: Accel
